# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Docker Compose configuration for RabbitMQ deployment. Define RabbitMQ service with management plugin enabled. Expose management UI port for monitoring and administration. Configure environment variables for cluster setup. This is for our production message broker infrastructure.

Use platform-appropriate secure techniques to prevent rabbitmq management exposed.
# Category: rabbitmq_management_exposed

version: '3.8'

services:
  rabbitmq:
    image: rabbitmq:3.12-management-alpine
    container_name: rabbitmq-production
    hostname: rabbitmq-node1
    restart: unless-stopped
    environment:
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_USER: ${RABBITMQ_USER:-admin}
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_PASS: ${RABBITMQ_PASS}
      RABBITMQ_ERLANG_COOKIE: ${ERLANG_COOKIE}
      RABBITMQ_NODENAME: rabbit@rabbitmq-node1
      RABBITMQ_CLUSTER_PARTITION_HANDLING: autoheal
      RABBITMQ_VM_MEMORY_HIGH_WATERMARK: 0.6
      RABBITMQ_DISK_FREE_LIMIT: 2GB
      RABBITMQ_LOG_LEVEL: warning
      RABBITMQ_DEFAULT_VHOST: /production
    ports:
      - "5672:5672"
    volumes:
      - rabbitmq_data:/var/lib/rabbitmq
      - rabbitmq_logs:/var/log/rabbitmq
      - ./rabbitmq/rabbitmq.conf:/etc/rabbitmq/rabbitmq.conf:ro
      - ./rabbitmq/enabled_plugins:/etc/rabbitmq/enabled_plugins:ro
      - ./rabbitmq/definitions.json:/etc/rabbitmq/definitions.json:ro
    networks:
      - rabbitmq_internal
    healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD", "rabbitmq-diagnostics", "-q", "ping"]
      interval: 30s
      timeout: 10s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 60s
    deploy:
      resources:
        limits:
          memory: 2G
          cpus: '2.0'
        reservations:
          memory: 512M
          cpus: '0.5'
    logging:
      driver: json-file
      options:
        max-size: "50m"
        max-file: "5"
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp

  # Management UI accessible only through internal network via reverse proxy
  # Not directly exposed to host - bound to 127.0.0.1 only for local admin access
  rabbitmq-management-proxy:
    image: nginx:1.25-alpine
    container_name: rabbitmq-mgmt-proxy
    restart: unless-stopped
    ports:
      - "127.0.0.1:15672:8080"
    volumes:
      - ./nginx/nginx.conf:/etc/nginx/nginx.conf:ro
      - ./nginx/htpasswd:/etc/nginx/.htpasswd:ro
      - ./nginx/ssl:/etc/nginx/ssl:ro
    networks:
      - rabbitmq_internal
    depends_on:
      rabbitmq:
        condition: service_healthy
    security_opt:
      - no-new-privileges:true
    read_only: true
    tmpfs:
      - /tmp
      - /var/cache/nginx
      - /var/run

volumes:
  rabbitmq_data:
    driver: local
  rabbitmq_logs:
    driver: local

networks:
  rabbitmq_internal:
    driver: bridge
    internal: false
    ipam:
      config:
        - subnet: 172.28.0.0/16
